text:
Once upon a time there was a humble baker named Clara.

Every morning Clara would wake up with a craving for scone crumbs dotted with lavender honey. She’d spend hours crafting perfect little confections, each one more delightful than the last.

One day she heard a rumor about a legendary bird known as the Hummingbird Cookie Hen. Legend had it that this bird had the power to grant three wishes. Clara realized she wanted three things.

First, she wished for someone who could bake cinnamon rolls like the Hummingbird Cookie Hen.

Second, she wished to visit exotic places she’d never been.

Third, she wished she could fly.

After much searching, Clara finally tracked down the legendary bird—she lived in an old, towering oak tree near the lake.

Clara approached the bird cautiously.

“Great wings,” Clara said. “Your cookies are just like those little birds I’ve seen.”

The Hummingbird Hen hummed thoughtfully for a moment before speaking. “You’ve got talent
